name: business-card-scanner-backend
description: Backend API for a business card scanner using Express, Google Vision OCR, and Google Sheets.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check app.js && node --check controllers/uploadController.js && node --check controllers/statusController.js && node --check controllers/resultsController.js && node --check queue/queueManager.js && node --check models/CardResult.js && node --check utils/database.js && node --check utils/resultStore.js && node --check services/ocrService.js && node --check services/parserService.js && node --check services/sheetService.js
